title: Bounded reverse-dependency depth
description:
Stop the reverse-dependency view from defaulting to unbounded output.

## Background

`graph deps --depth` defaults to 1, but `graph rdeps --depth` defaults to 0, meaning unbounded traversal, and `depth` is an unguarded `u32` (cli.rs:1333-1366). The transitive-dependency request on the graph commands needs an explicit bounded decision applied consistently across the two.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-19: graph rdeps defaults to a bounded depth and unbounded traversal is opt-in, consistent with graph deps.

## Notes

Touch cli.rs and the graph handlers; bound rdeps depth consistently with deps and make unbounded traversal opt-in. Update doc-comments.
